relationships.context: Classified as a conceptual_frame type primitive — a reframing lens rather than a tactical pattern
Primary application domain — defines the desired state of hiring as essence-based not credential-based
Applies to how talent is perceived and evaluated
Challenges conventional recruiting filters that rely on labels and history
Reframes career evaluation from credential accumulation to identity expression
Originally articulated on LinkedIn as part of V's public voice
Core voice primitive with 0.90 distinctiveness — a defining belief in V's philosophy of hiring and talent
